translation_text: Dao has of all things the most honoured place.
translation_text_raw: Dao has of all things the most honoured place.

translation_text: No treasures give good men so rich a grace;
translation_text_raw: No treasures give good men so rich a grace;

translation_text: Bad men it guards, and doth their ill efface.
translation_text_raw: Bad men it guards, and doth their ill efface.

translation_text: (its) admirable deeds can raise their performer above others.
translation_text_raw: (its) admirable deeds can raise their performer above others.

translation_text: Even men who are not good are not abandoned by it.
translation_text_raw: Even men who are not good are not abandoned by it.

chinese_text: 故立天子，置三公，雖有拱璧以先駟馬，不如坐進此道。
translation_text: Therefore when the sovereign occupies his place as the Son of Heaven, and he has appointed his three ducal ministers, though (a prince) were to send in a round symbol-of-rank large enough to fill both the hands, and that as the precursor of the team of horses (in the court-yard), such an offering would not be equal to (a lesson of) this Dao, which one might present on his knees.
translation_text_raw: Therefore when the sovereign occupies his place as the Son of Heaven, and he has appointed his three ducal ministers, though (a prince) were to send in a round symbol-of-rank large enough to fill both the hands, and that as the precursor of the team of horses (in the court-yard), such an offering would not be equal to (a lesson of) this Dao, which one might present on his knees.

translation_text: Why was it that the ancients prized this Dao so much?
translation_text_raw: Why was it that the ancients prized this Dao so much?

chinese_text: 不曰以求得，有罪以免邪？
translation_text: Was it not because it could be got by seeking for it, and the guilty could escape (from the stain of their guilt) by it?
translation_text_raw: Was it not because it could be got by seeking for it, and the guilty could escape (from the stain of their guilt) by it?

translation_text: This is the reason why all under heaven consider it the most valuable thing.
translation_text_raw: This is the reason why all under heaven consider it the most valuable thing.
